name: build-html-slides
description: Create art-directed HTML presentations with presenter notes and adaptive visual QA.

interface.shortDescription: Create HTML decks with notes and adaptive visual QA.
interface.longDescription: Build offline-portable HTML presentations with audience-aware story routing, a neutral 1280x720 runtime shell, topic-aware themes, WebP imagery, presenter notes, source caching, viewport-safe scaling, crop protection, and proportional Chromium visual review.
defaultPrompt: Create a quick HTML presentation draft with presenter notes.
Build and fully validate an audience-aware HTML slide deck.
Revise this HTML deck and validate only the changed slides.
